titleStmt.title: SII 10.407: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 407. (A.R. No. 207 of 1905.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE DARK ROOM (CHĪKAṬIMIDDI) IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1188. (Kshaya)

summary.p: States that Tammirāju, the minister of Pedda Mallayya Preggaḍa, who was himself the minister of Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntakadēva for the merit of his son Tripurāri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakavarṣaṁbulu 1188 Agu nēṁṭi kṣayasaṁvatsara caitra ba 3
gu . nāṁṭi mēṣasaṁkṣamaṇikālamuna svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja calamettugaṁḍa mūrurāyajagadaḷa kākatīyagaṇapatidēvama
hārājapādapadmōpajīvi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāprathāni
peddamallayyapregaḍavāri sakalarājyadhuraṁdhara maṁtrimāṇikya nīticāṇa
kya Āśritajanakalpadruma paramamāhēśvara sakaladharmasthāpakuṁ ḍaina śrīma
tu taṁmirāju tamapriyaputruṁḍu śrītripurāriki sarvārtthasādhaka mai
na puṇyamugānu svasti śrīparvatapūrvadvāra śrītripurāṁttakadēvaraku
Akhaṁḍadīpānaku niccinamōdālu 25 śubhaparaṁpa rāstu . śrī
Digital edition of SII 10.407 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
